positive: Minimalist woodland creature silhouette, featuring a fox and a cluster of autumn leaves, rendered in deep indigo blue and burnt orange tones. The composition should be highly centralized, allowing for excellent print placement on apparel. Use clean, thick lines and negative space to define the shapes. The style should be sophisticated modern vector art, resembling high-quality screen printing or lithography. Focus on sharp edges, strong silhouettes, and dramatic contrast. Perfect for screen printing on natural fiber clothing. Studio lighting, crisp details, highly stylized.
